name: Spongies Character Customisation [B42.16+]
description: This is the base mod. <LINE> Nothing else from Spongie’s Character Customisation is required for it to work. <LINE> This mod adds support for custom faces, muscles, body hair growth, and other new character customisation options. <LINE> <LINE> This is the main mod; everything else is completely optional. <LINE> Other mods, such as Tomb’s, add their own faces in their own way.
